category_sources: source_facts.description says C++ unit testing framework; official GitHub README says CxxTest is a unit testing framework for C++ similar to JUnit, CppUnit, and xUnit.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use CxxTest; source_facts.name is cxxtest.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides an overview and simple example and says the user guide can be downloaded from cxxtest.com.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/CxxTest/cxxtest, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable cxxtestgen; official README identifies C++ unit testing and xUnit-style role.
